# ai-ecc-multi-commands - Install multi-* commands via ccg-workflow

<!-- Rendered from docs/prompts/pack.yml - do NOT edit by hand. -->

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Kind | `ai-tooling` |
| Tier | B |
| Depends on | `ai-ecc-install-global` |

## Writes

## Exit criteria

- [ ] /multi-plan /multi-execute /multi-backend /multi-frontend /multi-workflow callable

## Prompt

external dependency in tools/ai/README.md.
